case_title: WILLIAM GREG EWALD VS. RUTH CONROY et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CONROY, RUTH
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR BERTRAND LEBLANC.
ARBITRATOR LYN CLAYTON BIERCE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-31-2012 THROUGH MAR-31-2013.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EWALD, WILLIAM GREG AS TO DEFENDANT CONROY, RUTH DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-17-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-02-2012
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EWALD, WILLIAM GREG SERVED MAY-29-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CONROY, RUTH
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EWALD, WILLIAM GREG JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR DEC-17-2012. OCT-17-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE DEC-27-2012.
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF EWALD, WILLIAM GREG
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF DEC-31-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR; DISMISSAL ON FILE.
